title: Fluffy Buttery Portuguese Chicken Curry
description: This dish is a creamy and flavorful Portuguese-inspired chicken curry with a buttery and pillowy texture, featuring mustard powder and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients. It is perfect for a comforting dinner on a rainy day.
instructions: Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to brown.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chicken to the saucepan and cook until it is browned on all sides and cooked through.
Add the mustard powder and curry powder to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute, until the spices are fragrant.
Pour in the coconut milk and chicken broth, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until it has reduced slightly and the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter until it is melted and the sauce is smooth.
Season the curry with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
